================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 0F 5D AD A1 0C
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1854
Reflected CC   : 0x3B
RetType        : 0x3B
RetCode        : 9
RetValSize     : 0

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1854
ReflectedCC  : 0x3B
PayloadLen   : 0
payload_valid=1

[UELYSYS STX]
return_data (0 bytes):

[PAYLOAD HEX]

[RETURN VALUE]

[BINARY DATA]
